card_name_verified: Marriott Bonvoy Business® American Express® Card
_review_reason: Card's primary recurring benefit is 1 Free Night Award (35K-points level) each cardmember anniversary. Per OpenCard convention requiring USD dollar amount for recurring_credits, free night awards without published $ value are excluded (consistent with chase-hyatt approach). Operator may choose to assign fair-value (~$200-250 retail for 35K Marriott category) and include — recommend a project-wide policy decision on free nights before doing this case-by-case.
_excluded: 1 Free Night Award (35K points level) annual (no published USD value)
Additional Free Night Award after $60k spend (conditional)
